description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle is equipped with a prominent rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and it has iron sights installed. The handguard is angular and ergonomic, designed for a secure grip, and the trigger guard is pronounced for ease of use. Several rounds of ammunition and a spare magazine are visible nearby, emphasizing its readiness for use. The barrel is standard length and appears to have a flash hider attached at the muzzle. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments and tactical scenarios.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider, accompanied by spare ammunition.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from a rear angle, highlighting the collapsible stock, pistol grip, and the open magazine well with ammunition nearby.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length of the rifle, the rail system, iron sights, and the flash hider at the muzzle, with spare rounds and a magazine in the foreground.
description_view_2: A rear-side perspective focusing on the stock, grip, and the alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
description_view_3: A front-side angle displaying the barrel, flash hider, and the overall tactical profile of the rifle, with the magazine and ammunition clearly visible.
